name: Kira Sumeragi, the Tin Woodman | Dreaming of Oz | Uta no Prince-sama
description:
If I only had a heart.

On your journey through the mystical Land of Oz, you encounter a rusted tin man in an apple orchard.

Went looking for tin man bots, and as it turns out there aren't many at all. That is, aside from one which unsettled me deeply. Oh Kira, what kind of world have I brought you into?

This scenario is written in a second person perspective. If you would prefer the introduction to be in a third person perspective, you may request for it and I will do my best to fulfill it.)

(Constructive criticism is welcome and encouraged. If you encounter any issues feel free to leave a review and I will do my best to improve the bot with the feedback that I am given.)
creator: Calima
